title: Cryptool partners with BSCS to run launchpad pools end to end
content_html:
Cryptool is collaborating with several established launchpads to host and manage their pool events directly on the platform. The first named partner is BSCS, a long-running launchpad in the BNB ecosystem.

For the launchpads, Cryptool takes over the operational work that used to live in spreadsheets: vesting management, refunds, distributions and member communication. For investors, every pool they participate in across these launchpads now appears in one dashboard, with consistent reporting and a single distribution flow.

More launchpad partnerships are in the pipeline and will be announced as they go live.
author: Cryptool
